scenes.name: orbiting_triplet
scenes.description: Three-lens cluster with a wall-safe orbiting beam.

scenes.name: splitter_braid
scenes.description: Two beams braid through a reflective beam-splitter cross.

scenes.name: breathing_lenses
scenes.description: A simplified two-lens scan with restrained breathing motion.

scenes.name: mirror_shutters
scenes.description: Opposed mirror shutters open and close around a downward beam.

scenes.name: prism_crown
scenes.description: A slow prism crown with a lead beam and a softer trailing echo.

scenes.name: waveguide_ribbon
scenes.description: A clean bezier ribbon waveguide fed by a narrow beam.

scenes.name: corner_crossfire
scenes.description: Cool and warm corner beams cross through a simple glass doublet.

scenes.name: caustic_ladder
scenes.description: A scanning beam walks across a vertical ladder of lenses.

scenes.name: aperture_waltz
scenes.description: Mirror slats open and close into a rhythmic gated field.

scenes.name: arc_resonator
scenes.description: A curved resonator cavity with a wall-safe warm beam through the center gap.

scenes.name: arc_resonator_dual_beam
scenes.description: Warm and white beams crossing a resonator gap with independently animated arcs.

scenes.name: mirror_fan
scenes.description: A five-blade mirror fan catches a beam through a small prism.

scenes.name: arc_bloom
scenes.description: Four mirrored crescents orbit around warm and white beams.

scenes.name: crescent_duet
scenes.description: Two large crescents trade the spotlight between a side beam and a top beam.

scenes.name: resonator_weave
scenes.description: Three offset resonator arcs weave under a warm-white triad of beams.

scenes.name: arc_lantern
scenes.description: A lantern-like cage of crescents is lit from the side and from above.

scenes.name: orbiting_crescents
scenes.description: Five small crescents circulate around a bright dual-beam core.

scenes.name: prism_bridge
scenes.description: A bridge of prisms floats between warm and white side beams.

scenes.name: prism_drum
scenes.description: A ring of prisms turns like a drum under a warm lead beam.

scenes.name: prism_sweep
scenes.description: A diagonal prism sweep catches light from both side walls.

scenes.name: prism_constellation
scenes.description: A loose constellation of prisms sparkles under side and top beams.

scenes.name: prism_parade
scenes.description: A straight parade of prisms glows between a warm beam and white support light.

scenes.name: counter_rotor
scenes.description: Two opposing rotor fans trade warm and white light across the room.

scenes.name: iris_gate
scenes.description: An iris of mirror blades opens and closes under a bright top beam.

scenes.name: louver_fan
scenes.description: A wide right-wall fan throws mirror slats across a warm side beam.

scenes.name: mirror_compass
scenes.description: A four-point mirror compass catches light from both sides and above.

scenes.name: rotor_cascade
scenes.description: Three small rotors climb diagonally through a warm-white beam exchange.

scenes.name: dual_ribbon
scenes.description: Two wide ribbons exchange a warm beam and white support light.

scenes.name: bridge_ribbon
scenes.description: Three ribbons form a gentle bridge beneath a side beam and a top wash.

scenes.name: ribbon_exchange
scenes.description: A ribbon pair bends into an off-center beam exchange.

scenes.name: silk_waveguide
scenes.description: Four fine ribbons create a brighter silk-like waveguide sheet.

scenes.name: tri_ribbon
scenes.description: Three ribbon lanes braid through warm and white side beams.

scenes.name: focus_columns
scenes.description: Two bright columns of lenses are scanned by warm and white side beams.

scenes.name: caustic_stair
scenes.description: A stair of lenses climbs diagonally through a warm scan beam.

scenes.name: lens_quartet
scenes.description: A diamond quartet of lenses is lit by a side beam and a top wash.

scenes.name: doublet_grid
scenes.description: A small grid of mixed lenses glows between warm and white side beams.

scenes.name: halo_lenses
scenes.description: A ring of lenses forms a halo beneath a three-way beam setup.

scenes.name: splitter_corridor
scenes.description: A short corridor of splitters carries light from both side walls.

scenes.name: splitter_compass
scenes.description: A compass of splitters catches a warm-white trident of beams.

scenes.name: trident_crossfire
scenes.description: Three beams strike a staggered splitter trident through the room center.

scenes.name: beam_exchange
scenes.description: Two diagonal splitters stage a clean warm-white beam exchange.

scenes.name: splitter_crown
scenes.description: A crown of splitters sits under a side beam and a top wash.
